mapper.sql: cs.id, cs.classroom_id classroomId, classroom.name classroomName, cs.course_id courseId, course.name courseName, course.duration, course.background_color backgroundColor, cs.teacher_id teacherId, teacher.name teacherName, cs.date, cs.attend_time attendTime, cs.finish_time finishTime
mapper.select:
select
from t_course_scheduling cs left join t_classroom classroom on cs.classroom_id = classroom.id left join t_course course on cs.course_id = course.id left join t_teacher teacher on cs.teacher_id = teacher.id where cs.id = #{id}

select date, count(id) count from t_course_scheduling where 1=1
and ${ew.sqlSegment}

select classroom.id as id, classroom.name as name, count(distinct cs.date) as occupiedDays from t_classroom classroom left join t_course_scheduling cs on classroom.id = cs.classroom_id and cs.date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by classroom.id, classroom.name order by occupiedDays desc;
